The brother of the friend of Eve arrived. A chocolate cake fell. The city was destroyed. If John is glad, then Mike is not glad. Riga is not in Estonia. The stone was heavy. A coffee cup broke. The picture was painted by Leo. Apparently, Tom left early. Clinton defeated Dole. A village road was narrow. Is Mike glad?
